label: 第143話
source_locator: 単行本17巻 目次 p.7
summary_short: 乙骨は虎杖を刺した直後に反転術式で蘇生し、五条から託されていた事情を明かす。虎杖は夢の中で、自分の母の姿をした羂索と父・仁の記憶を見る。
summary_full: 乙骨は直哉へ、反転術式で治療する代わりに虎杖が死亡したと上層部へ報告するよう求める。虎杖は意識の中で、祖父・倭助、父・仁、額に縫い目のある母・香織の記憶を見る。目覚めた虎杖へ乙骨は、上層部との縛りを満たすため一度本当に殺し、直後に反転術式で蘇生したと説明する。これは五条から虎杖を託されていたためだった。伏黒が合流し、死滅回游に参加させられた津美紀を救うため虎杖へ協力を求める。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: With 悠仁 and 脹相 both having been dealt with, 憂太 offers 直哉 a deal he can't refuse. 悠仁 has been "executed", but he has a dream of his mother, a woman with scars on her forehead just like 羂索 . Somehow he awakens, surprised to be alive and even more so to find that 憂太 by his side.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 憂太 negotiates with 直哉. As 憂太 looks down on the wounded 直哉, the latter glares back at him before vomiting up blood. He worries that 脹相 's 赤血操術 poisoned him, but assures himself that it isn't the effect of a 術式 . He realizes that 脹相 must be a full curse because of how much blood he used, guessing that his own body is rejecting the nonhuman blood. 憂太 offers to heal him with 反転術式 if he tells his superiors that 悠仁 died. In a flashback, a man named Jin is seen holding a baby and tells his father that if he wants to talk about her, he will just leave. The older man is revealed to be 悠仁's grandfather, 倭助 , who tells Jin that while he can live his life however he pleases, he will die if he doesn't give up on her. Jin tells 倭助 not to say such things in front of 悠仁 since babies apparently remember more than most believe. 倭助 mentions the fact that Jin wanted a child with a woman named Kaori, but before 倭助 can say something about her death, 虎杖香織 , now with stitches on her forehead ,interrupts him and addresses him as her father-in-law, asking what he's talking about. 悠仁 wakes up next to his executioner... 悠仁 suddenly awakens next to a fire as an emotionless 憂太 sits nearby. 悠仁 is surprised that he's not dead, and 憂太 smiles with relief, revealing that 五条 came to see him around September and asked if he would watch over 悠仁. In a flashback, 五条 tells 憂太 to take care of the first- and second-years (while 秤 should be fine) if anything happens to him. 憂太 wonders if 五条 means getting a girlfriend since he can't imagine anything happening to him. 五条 specifies that his primary concern should be a first-year named 虎杖悠仁, who was also to be executed in secret like 憂太 was. 五条 then asks where ミゲル is, but 憂太 replies that he doesn't want to see 五条. ...Only for 憂太 to reveal himself as an ally. Back in the present, 憂太 says that he put on the act for the higher-ups so that he would be the executioner in charge and know all the details about what's going on. He adds that to get approved as 悠仁's executioner, he had to enter into a 縛り to kill him, apologizing for doing so. A confused 悠仁 asks how he's still alive, and 憂太 replies that the very instant his heart stopped, he healed him with reversed 術式. He adds that not many people know he can do it, having guessed that it would work on 悠仁 given what he has heard about him. 憂太 points out that because it's the second time that 悠仁's death has been staged, the higher-ups will learn the truth soon but will consider his death sentence complete for the time being. 悠仁 wonders why he's doing all this for him, and 憂太 replies that 悠仁 is important to people who are important to him. He tells 悠仁 that he also used to possess a power that he couldn't handle, but says that while he invited his own upon himself, 悠仁 did not and shouldn't be blamed. 恵 finally reunites with 悠仁 to request his strength. 悠仁 says that blame isn't the issue, but before he can continue, 恵 suddenly walks out of the darkness and tells 悠仁 that they should head back to 呪術高専 . He adds that while the barrier is loosening, it should be fine for him to return as long as no one sees his face directly. Before 恵 can finish mentioning rejoining the older students, 悠仁 interrupts him by telling him not to act like everything is normal and nothing happened. 憂太 remembers 悠仁's words about not being able to die yet and says to himself that 悠仁 is unsure whether he deserves to live or not, realizing that it's the reason why he held back when the two were fighting. 悠仁 then yells that he has killed people and many are dead because of him, but 恵 says that it's all their fault, telling 悠仁 not to be selfish and give up by himself. As 悠仁 stays quiet and says to himself that he knew 恵 would say that, 恵 lets out a sigh and says that they are jujutsu sorcerers , not heroes fighting for justice. He explains that since they can't be judged, they have to keep proving to others that they deserve to exist, adding that they can't think about themselves with all the people they have to save. 恵 reminds 悠仁 that it was his original motive, but 悠仁 closes his eyes and says that it's because as long as 恵 is around him, he will suffer. 恵 then tells 悠仁 to start by saving him and begs him for his strength, revealing that 加茂憲紀 has started a 死滅回游 for those with 呪力 in which 津美紀 is trapped. The 死滅回游's eight rules are listed: Players must declare their participation at any given barrier within 19 days after awakening a 術式. Players who break the first rule could have their 術式 removed. Non-players who enter the barrier become players and are considered to have declared their participation. Points are scored by killing other players. Points are determined by the game master, with sorcerers worth five points and non-sorcerers one point. Players may spend 100 points (excluding the value of their own life) with the game master to add one new rule. The game master must accept any new rule except those that have a considerable and prolonged effect on the game. Players could have their 術式 removed if their score stays the same for 19 days.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 乙骨憂太 禪院直哉 脹相 虎杖悠仁 虎杖仁 (回想) 虎杖倭助 (回想) 虎杖香織 (言及のみ) 虎杖仁's Second Wife (回想) 五条悟 (回想) 秤金次 (言及のみ) ミゲル (言及のみ) 伏黒恵 加茂憲紀 (言及のみ) 伏黒津美紀
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 乙骨憂太の術式 反転術式 術式

key_events_verified_phase8: 乙骨が直哉を治療する条件を提示する
虎杖が仁・香織・倭助の記憶を見る
乙骨が虎杖を反転術式で蘇生していたと明かす
伏黒が津美紀救出への協力を求める
verification_notes_phase8: 集英社公式16～18巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第八段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
